title: D.A.Y. Republic 28pc Double Six Classic Retro Domino Game, Traditional Set in Wooden Case, Educational Travel Sized Toy (Dominoes in Wood Box)
features: TRADITIONAL FAMILY GAME NIGHT FUN - Double Six Dominoes is a timeless game suitable for adults and children alike. This 28 piece game can be played by any ability, from domino novices to seasoned pros! An excellent addition to any quality family time. An absolute classic, use as an educational toy that helps children learn, made for all age groups
LONG LASTING - Lightweight and durable wooden case will keep for years without it breaking or fading during long term storage

28 PIECE DOMINO SET - This double-six domino set includes 28 tiles in a wooden case. Each case has enough pieces for 2-4 players to play together. Features black & white colours and are very strong but lightweight. These dominoes will not break!

GREAT FOR TRAVEL - Great size to pack in a suitcase or take on camping holiday. The dominoes are easy to store in a small wooden case and make great on the go entertainment. Play anywhere! Wooden case measures: 15cm x 5cm x 3cm/6” x 2” x 1.2” and each domino measures: 3.8cm x 1.8cm x 0.5cm

EDUCATIONAL - Learn whilst having fun! Dominoes can help youngsters with learning numbers, identifying patterns, and strategy. Dominoes are an excellent game for screen-free family bonding, and can be played anywhere - all you need is a flat surface! Add a new dimension to your gaming with this classic set
description: Product Description This traditional classic game for kids and adults is sure to provide fabulous fun for up to 10 players and comes with full instructions on how to play. Dominos are a timeless classic and are sure to be as popular as ever when you host your next family or friend game night! Family Friendly Fun Dominos is one of the original classic games for kids and adults and provides an immersive and thrilling family gaming experience each time you play! Neat Storage Box The dominoes for children come in a stylish retro wooden box meaning they can be neatly transported on holidays or day trips without taking up space! Precise Pub Game This travel game for adults is ideal for game nights in your local pub. Now you can enjoy your favourite beverage whilst you play your next match! Vivid Black Dominoes This classic game comes with 28 high-quality domino pieces in a striking black and white color scheme, reminiscent of the retro era! Classic Games For Kids This classic domino set is a timeless and engaging childrens game presented in a travel sized wooden case. Traditional dominos offer endless hours of entertainment while helping strategic thinking and friendly competition. Ideal for educational play and game nights the travel-sized design of this domino set makes it a versatile companion for any occasion. This classic game includes 28 domino pieces. The pieces are designed to ensure a satisfying and enjoyable experience for players of all ages.
